## Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes introduced by this PR.

## Platform Version Impact
- Does this change increment the platform version? (Yes/No)
- Targeted Version: 

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / standard (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation / prompt update

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have read the `AGENTS.md` constitution before submitting.
- [ ] The local validation script (`bash scripts/validate.sh`) passes without errors.
- [ ] Markdown links inside my modified files are fully working.
- [ ] New prompt files include the required metadata headers.
- [ ] New agent files include responsibilities, allowed files, and escalation rules.
